name: python3-yara
title: python3-yara
description:
Python 3 bindings for YARA
YARA is a tool aimed at helping malware researchers to identify and
classify malware samples. With YARA, it is possible to create
descriptions of malware families based on textual or binary patterns
contained in samples of those families. Each description consists of
a set of strings and a Boolean expression which determines its logic.
.
Complex and powerful rules can be created by using binary strings with
wild-cards, case-insensitive text strings, special operators, regular
expressions and many other features.
.
This package provides Python 3 bindings.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-yara because Python 3 bindings for YARA.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-yara as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-yara with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-yara --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
